'''bayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ghastly|ghastly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ghastly|ghastly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:bayate|bayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bayatesher|bayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayatesherĂ«m|bayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bayatero|bayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bayateshĂ«|bayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayateshĂ«m|bayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibayatero|gokibayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibayateshĂ«|gokibayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayateshĂ«m|gokibayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobayankerom|gobayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobayankeshĂ«|gobayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayankeshĂ«m|gobayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobayankeya|gobayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bayaterom|bayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayatemu|bayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bayateya|bayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibayaterom|gokibayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayatemu|gokibayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibayateya|gokibayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:bayayate|bayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bayayatesher|bayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayayatesherĂ«m|bayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bayayatero|bayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bayayateshĂ«|bayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayayateshĂ«m|bayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibayayatero|gokibayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibayayateshĂ«|gokibayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayayateshĂ«m|gokibayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobayayankerom|gobayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobayayankeshĂ«|gobayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobayayankeshĂ«m|gobayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobayayankeya|gobayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bayayaterom|bayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bayayatemu|bayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bayayateya|bayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibayayaterom|gokibayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibayayatemu|gokibayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibayayateya|gokibayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠte|bĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠtesher|bĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠtero|bĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠyĂŠtero|gokibĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gobĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠterom|bĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠtemu|bĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠyĂŠteya|bĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠyĂŠterom|gokibĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠyĂŠteya|gokibĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:bafyafte|bafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bafyaftesher|bafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafyaftesherĂ«m|bafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafyaftero|bafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bafyafteshĂ«|bafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafyafteshĂ«m|bafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafyaftero|gokibafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibafyafteshĂ«|gokibafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafyafteshĂ«m|gokibafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobafyafnkerom|gobafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobafyafnkeshĂ«|gobafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobafyafnkeshĂ«m|gobafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobafyafnkeya|gobafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bafyafterom|bafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bafyaftemu|bafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bafyafteya|bafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibafyafterom|gokibafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibafyaftemu|gokibafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibafyafteya|gokibafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
